sections.instruction: Questions 1-3: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 4-10: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What total discount is Jonathon’s school being offered?
Where did Jonathon first want to take his students?
What is the normal price of this tour?

sections.instruction: Questions 11 and 12: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 13-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: What does the word ‘formula’ stand for?
options: the type of roads used for the races

questions.content: When did the first championship race take place?

sections.instruction: Questions 21-27: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 28-30: Choose THREE letters A-G.
sections.passage_or_context: The official decision on whether to buy Bizz-Educators will be taken at tomorrow’s (27) {{BLANK}}

questions.content: What THREE requirements are there for the takeover of Bizz Educators to go ahead?
options: Assurances that the management of Bizz Educators won’t oppose the deal
An independent mediator be used to broker the deal
An audit of the company’s books
That a study of the company’s projected profit margin be conducted
That the deal be kept secret until it is finalized
That an analysis of the company’s goodwill assets be carried out
That the asking price be lowered

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
